violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the chest has an accumulation of milk residue and ice. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The floor coating under the dish washing area was observed to be peeling/chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Egg Omelets previously heated in the oven were observed held at 124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Eggs Omelets were reheated in the oven at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

The following areas of the Physical Facilities were observed to be in poor repair at the time of inspection... - The floor coating under the dish washing area was observed to be peeling/chipping - The ceiling covering in the dry storage area was observed to be sagging/detached The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
